_meta.keyKnowledge: We apply and refine physical and expressive skills to interpret style-specific dances, devise our own dances, and communicate ideas and meaning.

_source.w: We apply and refine physical and expressive skills to interpret style-specific dances, devise our own dances, and communicate ideas and meaning.
y: Interpreting established dance styles builds our technical vocabulary and understanding of the art form.
Devising original choreography develops our ability to translate personal ideas into movement.
Refining our skills across styles prepares us to express ourselves with greater precision and impact.
eg: We learn a traditional or contemporary dance style and focus on its specific techniques.
We create original choreography that communicates a message about identity, belonging or change.
We combine elements from different styles to create a unique fusion dance piece.
We work on spatial awareness and timing to improve the clarity of our movement.
We use improvisation as a starting point, then shape the material into a structured work.
We perform a devised dance that explores the relationship between two contrasting ideas.
